arguments.task: Open official BigCommerce docs pages directly and return exact findings with URLs and short quotes for: platform/API description, whether BigCommerce provides REST APIs and GraphQL APIs, authentication methods for BigCommerce API calls/apps, rate-limit policy or headers, and whether docs mention an MCP server for AI agents. Prioritize docs.bigcommerce.com and developer.bigcommerce.com only. Also determine whether creating apps/API credentials is self-serve from docs or appears to require a paid store/account. Summarize in bullets with one URL per bullet.

input.thought: Restart with a narrower, direct-docs extraction task after the first session stalled.

raw_result.description: Ecommerce platform with developer APIs and tools for building storefront, catalog, order, and app integrations.
raw_result.auth_notes: Official BigCommerce developer docs support OAuth for apps and token-based authentication for API accounts/access tokens; docs also indicate an MCP server endpoint for AI agent setup, but the exact auth mechanism for MCP was not verified from gathered evidence.
raw_result.gating_reason: Developer docs indicate API/app usage is tied to BigCommerce stores/apps; evidence gathered was insufficient to verify any free self-serve API tier, so a paid store/account may be required for practical API use.

api_surface.breadth: Official docs indicate both REST Management APIs and GraphQL Storefront APIs, supporting storefront and back-office commerce integrations; breadth appears substantial across common ecommerce resources.
api_surface.mcp_notes: Official docs include an AI Agent Setup page that explicitly mentions a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server.

raw_result.blocker: Public docs and auth exist, but practical build setup may require a BigCommerce store/account and some auth/access details remain unverified from the gathered evidence.
raw_result.rate_limit_notes: Rate limits are referenced in official docs navigation, but specific limits/headers were not successfully extracted from evidence already gathered.
raw_result.notable_signals: Official developer site is extensive; docs include AI Agent Setup with MCP mention, suggesting active support for agent-oriented integrations.
raw_result.human_review_reason: Need human verification for exact auth variants, whether API access is self-serve free vs requires paid store/account, and specific rate-limit documentation/values because these were not fully captured from the gathered evidence.
